Free Overview Guide

Zhangjiajie & Enshi Canyon Nature Travel Guide

Zhangjiajie · Wulingyuan · Tianmen Mountain · Enshi Grand Canyon · Pingshan | 14 Days / 13 Nights

A clear, first-time-friendly nature route connecting Zhangjiajie quartz-sandstone peak forests, cliff paths, mountain cableways, Enshi canyon scenery, clear-water gorges and western Hubei Tujia mountain landscapes.

View route previewPlanning tips
Overview

Trip at a Glance

This free version gives the route structure and main planning logic. It intentionally keeps timing, hotels, restaurants and ticket choices broad so you can first judge whether the route fits your travel style.

DURATION
14 days / 13 nights
TRANSPORT
Scenic shuttles, cableways, elevator, taxi, train and private car
BEST FOR
First-time nature travelers in China, photographers, couples, families and light hikers
ROUTE STYLE
Peak forests + cliff paths + glass walkways + gorges + clear-water canyons

Overall Itinerary

14-day route structure

Day 1

Arrive in Zhangjiajie -> rest and setup

Recommended area: Zhangjiajie City or Wulingyuan

Food / transfer style: Sanxiaguo dry pot, Tujia dishes · airport/rail taxi + hotel check-in

Day 2-4

Wulingyuan core areas -> Yuanjiajie / Tianzi Mountain / Golden Whip Stream choice days

Recommended area: Wulingyuan Landmark Gate / Xibu Street / East Gate area

Food / transfer style: Tujia cuisine, simple scenic snacks · scenic shuttle + Bailong Elevator/cableway

Day 5-6

Tianmen Mountain -> Grand Canyon / Huanglong Cave / Baofeng Lake

Recommended area: Zhangjiajie City or Wulingyuan

Food / transfer style: City restaurants, fish head, dry pot · cableway/taxi/private car

Day 7-8

Zhangjiajie -> Enshi -> Qingjiang or easy city buffer

Recommended area: Enshi Railway Station / Daughter City / city center

Food / transfer style: Hezha, Tujia dishes, local snacks · train + taxi/private car

Day 9-11

Enshi Grand Canyon -> Yunlong Ground Fissure / recovery -> Pingshan Canyon

Recommended area: Enshi City, canyon area or Hefeng / Pingshan

Food / transfer style: Packed snacks, Enshi local meals · private car/small group transfer

Day 12-14

Suobuya Stone Forest / Tenglong Cave -> flexible buffer -> departure

Recommended area: Enshi / Lichuan / Yichang or Wuhan direction

Food / transfer style: Final local meal · buffer day, no distant sights on departure day

Free-version planning rule: use this as a route preview. Reconfirm exact trains, scenic tickets, cableways/elevators, weather, hotel passport check-in and transfer prices before making final bookings.
Travel Tips

Before you start

Keep these points in mind before you start the route.

Payment

Set up Alipay or WeChat Pay before arrival and carry RMB cash backup for drivers, small restaurants and mountain areas.

Internet

Prepare an eSIM or international roaming for maps, translation, ride-hailing and mobile payment.

Heights & walking

This route includes cliff paths, cableways, glass walkways, stairs and long scenic-area walking. Do not force every viewpoint.

Weather

Fog, rain and visibility strongly affect Zhangjiajie and Enshi views. Use caves, lakes or rest days as backups.

Tickets

Use official channels, Trip.com, Ctrip, hotel desks or manual counters. Reconfirm passport-based ticketing rules and time slots.

Transfers

Pingshan Canyon and Enshi Grand Canyon need early starts and reliable transport. Confirm opening status, water level and return plan.
